title: Build prompt-aware SAVE and RESTORE driver
description: Add a deterministic PTY-backed scenario runner that can answer interpreter filename prompts and capture transcripts.
close_reason: The declarative pexpect driver, variable expansion, transcript capture, exit validation, filesystem self-test, safe formatting, and leak-safe error handling are implemented.

title: Build isolated production-state probes
description: Add test-only setup, mutation, and report verbs that observe exact Release 1216 variables, queues, and object locations without entering production.
close_reason: A separate test story now exposes narrow troll, egg, dam, leak, and ritual setup, corruption, timer, and observation commands; production source is explicitly checked for their absence.

title: Qualify bound troll and both egg outcomes
description: Use production restraint plus prepared and unprepared nest-fire mechanics, then prove flags, rope commitment, axe location, passages, intact egg, broken egg, and broken canary survive repeated restore.
close_reason: Real restraint, prepared intact catch, and canonical BAD-EGG destruction all survived deliberate object-tree corruption and two restores from each save; the original EGG remained offstage in the broken snapshot.

title: Qualify dam gate and reservoir interrupt persistence
description: Open the canonical sluices, save the live timer, corrupt the state, restore it, and prove the resumed interrupt reaches low tide.
close_reason: The yellow interlock, open sluices, and queued eight-turn reservoir transition survived corruption and repeated restore; the restored interrupt resumed to LOW-TIDE.

title: Qualify active and repaired leak persistence
description: Save both a rising maintenance leak and the canonical putty repair, then prove each restores independently with correct queue and repair-sentinel state.
close_reason: An active leak restored with its rising-water interrupt, while an independent repaired snapshot restored canonical WATER-LEVEL -1 and a cancelled maintenance interrupt after deliberate re-break corruption.

title: Qualify ritual completion and hot-bell timer persistence
description: Complete the canonical ceremony, save knowledge and ghost removal with the active hot-bell timer, corrupt it, restore it, and prove cooldown resumes.
close_reason: Canonical exorcism completion, learned and wrong-order memory, mirror resonance, ghost removal, transformed bell state, and the queued 20-turn hot-bell cooldown survived corruption and restore; the interrupt resumed to the cool bell.

title: Resolve persistence review and document evidence
description: Address valid review findings and replace checkpoint documentation with exact passed routes, limitations, and artifacts.

title: Publish persistence qualification capstone
description: Run exact-head CI, close the beadtrain, update the PR truthfully, and leave the non-draft PR ready but unmerged.
